name: scene_nodes_floatingio_probe.experimental
description: EXPERIMENTAL — narrowly-scoped Floating IO probe per GPT 5.5's plan. ONE capsule, ONE Memory, ONE Floating IO, ONE direction, ONE exposed-port attempt. Inspects: (a) graph structure via scene_nodes_walk, (b) wires via GetConnections, (c) host capsule parameters via enumerate_descids, (d) host userdata via enumerate_userdata. Each step is wrapped defensively so a single failing probe doesn't wedge subsequent ones. ALL steps have empty asserts so we can observe behavior without false-positives. KEEP SEPARATE from verified pattern recipes — the PORTLIST contract is not yet understood and probes here may produce contaminated graphs.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['FIO_Probe']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('floatingio probe setup ok')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
gen = c4d.BaseObject(180420700)
gen.SetName('FIO_Probe')
doc.InsertObject(gen)
c4d.EventAdd()
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(gen)
result = GraphDescription.ApplyDescription(g, [
    {'$type': 'Memory', '$name': 'fio_mem'},
    {'$type': 'Floating IO', '$name': 'fio_io'},
])
# Find resulting instance IDs
mem_id = io_id = None
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if '@' in cid and '/' not in cid:
        b = cid.split('@')[0]
        if b == 'memory': mem_id = cid
        elif b == 'floatingio': io_id = cid
print(f'mem_id={mem_id}, io_id={io_id}')
if not mem_id or not io_id: raise RuntimeError('failed to add Memory + Floating IO')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
gen = doc.SearchObject('FIO_Probe')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(gen)
mem_node = None
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if '@' in cid and '/' not in cid and cid.split('@')[0] == 'memory':
        mem_node = c; break
if not mem_node: raise RuntimeError('memory not found')
nextout = next((p for p in (mem_node.GetOutputs().GetChildren() or []) if str(p.GetId()).endswith('nextout._0')), None)
conns = list(nextout.GetConnections(1))
print(f'memory.nextout._0 outgoing connections: {len(conns)}')
for (target_port, wires) in conns:
    print(f'  -> {str(target_port.GetId())}')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['FIO_Probe']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('floatingio probe teardown ok')
